runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "typescript", "build_system": "npm", "package_manager": "npm", "build_commands": ["npm ci", "npm run build"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "12", "system_packages": ["git", "ca-certificates", "python3", "build-essential"]}, "repo_type": "desktop_app", "base_image": "node:slim", "base_image_rationale": "A lightweight Node.js image (slim variant) provides the required Node 12.x-era tooling to build a TypeScript/Angular Chrome extension without extra GUI dependencies.", "pitfalls": ["node:slim may pull a newer Node version than the engines specify; pin exact Node 12.x if needed.", "npm ci requires a package-lock.json; ensure lockfile is present in repo.", "Building native dependencies is unlikely, but if any node-gyp modules appear, additional build tools may be required."], "notes": "This blueprint targets building the Augury browser extension via npm scripts in a Node.js environment; packaging the final Chrome extension (pack script) is optional and can be invoked after build."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM node:12-bullseye-slim

# Install essential system dependencies for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source
RUN npm run build

# Create a non-root user for running the app
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/sh app
RUN chown -R app:app /app

USER app

WORKDIR /app

# Expose nothing by default; container will run a shell for inspection
CMD ["/bin/sh"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:12-slim

# Essential OS dependencies for building node modules and git
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build from source
RUN npm run build

# Default to a shell to keep container running for inspection
CMD ["bash"]
"}

The current CMD is just bash for inspection.
Build error:
- Failing step (failing command/step):
  [2/7] RUN apt-get update &&     apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential &&     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  
- Exact error message and exit code (preserved):
  ERROR: failed to build: failed to solve: process "/bin/sh -c apt-get update &&     apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential &&     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*" did not complete successfully: exit code: 100

- Missing packages or files mentioned:
  - The apt-get update could not fetch package lists due to deprecated Debian stretch repositories:
    - 404 Not Found for http://deb.debian.org/debian/dists/stretch/main/binary-amd64/Packages
    - 404 Not Found for http://deb.debian.org/debian/dists/stretch-updates/main/binary-amd64/Packages
    - 404 Not Found for http://security.debian.org/debian-security/dists/stretch/updates/main/binary-amd64/Packages

  - Consequence: The requested packages (git, ca-certificates, python3, build-essential) could not be retrieved/installed in this step.

- Version mismatch / context:
  - Base image shown: node:12-slim, which is using Debian Stretch (stretch). The Stretch repositories are end-of-life and no longer serve Release files, causing the apt-get update/install to fail. This is a mismatch between the base image’s Debian version and available apt repositories, leading to the observed 404s/Release-file errors.
steps.tool_output:
- VerifyBuild status: build_failed

- Concerns
  - Base image node:12-slim is end-of-life; upgrade to a supported LTS (e.g., node:18-alpine or node:20-slim).
  - No non-root user defined; container runs as root by default (security concern for production).
  - If this is a GUI/desktop app (Electron), headless/container setup may be required (DISPLAY, X11/VNC, or headless Electron). Current CMD is just bash for inspection.

- Build error
  - Failing step: [2/7] RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  - Exact error (exit code 100):
    ERROR: failed to build: failed to solve: process "/bin/sh -c apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*" did not complete successfully: exit code: 100
  - Missing packages/files due to deprecated Debian stretch repositories:
    - 404 Not Found for http://deb.debian.org/debian/dists/stretch/main/binary-amd64/Packages
    - 404 Not Found for http://deb.debian.org/debian/dists/stretch-updates/main/binary-amd64/Packages
    - 404 Not Found for http://security.debian.org/debian-security/dists/stretch/updates/main/binary-amd64/Packages

  - Result: E: Some index files failed to download. They have been ignored, or old ones used instead.
  - Consequence: The requested packages (git, ca-certificates, python3, build-essential) could not be retrieved/installed.

- Version mismatch / context
  - Base image node:12-slim uses Debian Stretch; Stretch repositories are end-of-life and no longer provide Release files, causing apt-get update/install to fail. This mismatch leads to the 404/Release-file errors.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:14-slim

# Essential OS dependencies for building node modules and git
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build from source
RUN npm run build

# Default to a shell to keep container running for inspection
CMD ["bash"]
"}

- Failing command/step
  - Step: [2/7] RUN apt-get update &&     apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential &&     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  - Dockerfile snippet (from logs):
    RUN apt-get update && \
        apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \

- Missing packages or files mentioned

    - Err:4 http://deb.debian.org/debian buster Release

- Version mismatch info
  - The base image in use is node:14-slim (as seen in the build steps), which is pulling Debian "buster" (Debian 10) repositories. Those Debian buster repos are end-of-life and no longer provide Release files, causing the apt-get update to fail with 404 and “Release file” errors. This indicates a version mismatch between the base image (Debian buster) and the current apt repositories.

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies from lockfile for reproducible builds
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source and build
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

# Provide an interactive shell for inspection if needed
CMD ["bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:18-slim

# Install essential build tools (git, Python, build tools) if needed for npm install
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build from source
RUN npm run build

# Default to a shell so container can be inspected if needed
CMD ["bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:12-bullseye-slim

# Install required system dependencies for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies using npm ci for reproducible builds
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source
RUN npm run build

# Provide an interactive shell for inspection
CMD ["bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:12-bullseye-slim

# Install essential system dependencies for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source
RUN npm run build

# Create a non-root user for running the app
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/sh app
RUN chown -R app:app /app

USER app

WORKDIR /app

# Expose nothing by default; container will run a shell for inspection
CMD ["/bin/sh"]
"}

Smoke [PASS]: test -f /app/package.json

artifacts.content:
FROM node:12-bullseye-slim

# Install essential system dependencies for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to leverage npm ci caching
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

RUN npm ci

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source
RUN npm run build

# Create a non-root user for running the app
RUN useradd -m -s /bin/sh app
RUN chown -R app:app /app

USER app

WORKDIR /app

# Expose nothing by default; container will run a shell for inspection
CMD ["/bin/sh"]
